commands.review_summary:
The PR changes memory-core memory_search to derive the outer deadline from resolved QMD backend timeout settings for active QMD searches and adds regression coverage for slow and stalled QMD paths.

PR surface: Source +63, Tests +90. Total +153 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main wraps memory_search in a fixed 15-second deadline while QMD search itself uses the resolved memory.qmd.limits.timeoutMs. I did not run a live current-main repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is maintainer coordination and conflict resolution, not a narrow automated code repair from this review.
